shared.policy_snippet: Other MyFitnessPal Users. We may disclose your personal information to other MyFitnessPal users in the context of specific features that are social in nature as part of the Services. For example, we will display any personal information that you post or make available using the Services’ public-facing or interactive features, community forums, or discussion blogs.

collected.policy_snippet: MyFitnessPal may collect Usage and Device Data. This may include details about your browser, operating system, or device (such as your cookie identifiers, internet protocol (IP) address, ​​mobile advertising identifier, and other unique identifiers), internet service provider, mobile carrier, general location information (including inferred location based off of your IP address), actions that you take while using the Services, information about how you interact with the Services, including the frequency and duration of your activities, information about the links you click, and other information about how you use the Services.
collected.purpose: This snippet explicitly says the service collects actions taken while using the services, interaction information, frequency and duration of activities, links clicked, and other information about service use. These are behavioral data because they describe user actions and patterns of interaction.

data_minimization.reasoning: The policy describes broad collection of behavioral data such as actions taken, interaction information, frequency and duration of activities, links clicked, and other information about how users use the services. It does not provide concrete limits showing that only the minimum necessary behavioral data is collected.

shared.policy_snippet: Our Marketing and Advertising Partners. We may disclose your personal information, including device and browser information and activity and usage information, to our marketing and advertising partners, including social media platforms, third-party advertising networks, and other parties that assist us in serving, measuring the performance of, and optimizing our advertising campaigns.
shared.purpose: The snippet explicitly says activity and usage information is disclosed to marketing and advertising partners. Activity and usage information is behavioral data, and the stated purpose is serving, measuring, and optimizing advertising campaigns.

It also states that personal information may be transferred to the United States and other countries, increasing exposure of behavioral data across partners and jurisdictions.
